notes: Only the Blueprint status area keeps dynamic throbber effects.
Existing event-facing variable widget names/classes are preserved where applicable.
Added Text_Erro variable for existing Blueprint graph compatibility.
Input box WidgetStyle is fully specified to match the dark tech reference UI instead of relying on default UMG textbox chrome.
